case_title: THOMAS A. LUCAS VS. A. DRAEGER VALENCIA, AS EMPLOYEE OF

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-23-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT A. DRAEGER VALENCIA, AS EMPLOYEE OF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,047.70 FILED BY LUCAS, THOMAS A. AS TO DEFENDANT A. DRAEGER VALENCIA, AS EMPLOYEE OF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2011 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. DEFENDANT DREAGER VALENCIA NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHASE BANK PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO A. DRAEGER VALENCIA, AS EMPLOYEE OF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-07-2011 AT 10:00AM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-22-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUCAS, THOMAS A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK $3,047.70 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,167.70, DEFENDANT A. DRAEGER VALENCIA DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE PROVISIONS OF FINANCE CODE SECTION 952 BECAUSE INTER/PLEA PLAINTIFF WAS NOT AN ADVERSE PARTY, BUT BY VIRTUE OF TEMPORARY CONSERVATORSHIP, STOOD IN THE PALCE OF THE TRUSTEE ALEX WASIK. (SEE AARO PRODUCTIONS, INC. VS. CROCKER NATIONAL BANK (1986) (179 CA3D 1061) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
